name: Michelangelo's Garlic Spaghetti
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook spaghetti in a large pot of boiling, salted water. Drain pasta, reserving 4 tablespoons of cooking liquid.
2. Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add garlic and cook until golden. Add salt, pepper, and parsley to taste.
3. Stir drained spaghetti into the pan with garlic mixture. On low heat, mix in reserved cooking liquid. Stir for 3 to 4 minutes. Serve with grated cheese. Makes 4 to 6 servings.
